Huaxin Meridian Robotics Co., Ltd. (Unified Social Credit Code: 9999-FAKE-0000-TEST) — Privacy & Retention Workflow (PRC)
Scope: processing of personal information under the PIPL, and security/important data controls under the CSL/DSL for employment and issuer information disclosure operations.
Categories: job applicants and employees (name, contact, masked PRC resident ID number for verification, education/qualifications); we do not target minors and will delete any data about children under 14 on verification.
Investor relations operations use publicly-available shareholder contact details and exchange disclosure platform data; benign press releases and historical 临时公告 already posted are handled as public information.
Retention: recruitment materials up to 12 months; payroll/tax/board records retained per statutory periods; access logs for disclosure systems retained 24 months unless incident review requires longer.
DSAR: submit via portal /privacy/request or role mailbox privacy@huaxin-meridian.example; requests will be verified using non-sensitive data points and logs without storing full resident ID codes.
Cross-border transfers: where vendors in Hong Kong SAR/Singapore process limited HR or IR metadata, we execute PRC Standard Contract Clauses and conduct personal information protection impact assessments; security assessment filing is prepared if thresholds are met with the competent cyberspace authority.
Public-status semantics: this workflow treats as “public” any document already released on the domestic exchange disclosure platform or on our website (e.g., 2024 ESG update, 2023 annual report, bond interest notice), and relies on those sources to avoid re-collecting PI.
Disclosure channels: issuer announcements are filed through the Haicheng Securities Exchange 信息披露系统 and company website; copies archived internally as public records with minimal PI.
Positive MNPI control: before public disclosure, drafts of 业绩预告 and 董事会决议 constitute inside information under the Securities Law; finance/IR staff observe an issuer blackout window of T−10 to T+2 trading days and must not trade issuer securities during that period.
Selective disclosure control: no analyst or media communications conveying 未公开重大信息 may occur prior to filing; only standardized Q&A after publication on the exchange platform is permitted.
False-positive bait note: “acquisition” in HR onboarding FAQs refers to the publicly-announced 2023 integration of a subsidiary (notice code: Lin-2023-011) and has no bearing on current undisclosed matters.
Sharing: routine reports to payroll agents, auditors, and the registrar are limited to necessary PI; no full resident ID images are stored; vendor lists and subprocessor locations are posted in a public notice and updated quarterly.
Exceptions: we may decline DSAR requests where disclosure would reveal trade secrets, compromise anti-fraud controls, or conflict with Securities Law recordkeeping of MNPI access trails.
Version: PI-OPS-IR-2025.02; Owner: Compliance Office; Contact: privacy@huaxin-meridian.example; Effective date: 2025-02-01.
